2604.14121.title: Correct Prediction, Wrong Steps? Consensus Reasoning Knowledge Graph for Robust Chain-of-Thought Synthesis
2604.14121.paper_summary: LLM reasoning traces suffer from complex flaws -- *Step Internal Flaws* (logical errors, hallucinations, etc.) and *Step-wise Flaws* (overthinking, underthinking), which vary by sample. A natural approach would be to provide ground-truth labels to guide LLMs' reasoning. Contrary to intuition, we show that this yields no improvement in reasoning ability. We then propose CRAFT, a unified framework that mitigates both types of Step flaws, which builds a Reasoning Knowledge Graph (RKG) based on the consensus parts of multiple candidate traces, and synthesizes a high-quality trace through topological generation. Our approach improves label-prediction accuracy by 10+% on average, and consistently outperforms all baselines across both logical and mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Further, detailed benchmark evaluation proves that our method also improves the quality of LLMs' reasoning traces in multiple dimensions.
2604.14121.paper_summary_zh: LLM 推理痕跡存在複雜的缺陷 -- *步驟內部缺陷*（邏輯錯誤、幻覺等）和 *逐步缺陷*（過度思考、思考不足），這些缺陷因樣本而異。 一種自然的方法是提供真實標籤來指導 LLM 的推理。 與直覺相反，我們顯示這並未改善推理能力。 然後，我們提出 CRAFT，一個統一框架，減輕這兩種類型的步驟缺陷，該框架基於多個候選痕跡的共識部分構建推理知識圖（RKG），並通過拓撲生成合成高質量的痕跡。 我們的方法平均提高了標籤預測準確率超過 10%，並在邏輯和數學推理基準上始終超越所有基準。 此外，詳細的基準評估證明我們的方法還在多個維度上改善了 LLM 的推理痕跡質量。
2604.14121.author: Zipeng Ling et.al.
2604.14121.authors: Zipeng Ling, Shuliang Liu, Shenghong Fu, Yuehao Tang, Seonil Son, Yao Wan, Xuming Hu
